Zone Change to H Sand

The GC 112 A004 ST01 well was drilled and completed as a single selective by Shell in 1999. The S10B sand was produced initially but oil production declined rapidly. In 2000, the well was recompleted to isolate the S10B sand and open the S10A2 sand. In August 2016, Marubeni conducted a change zone operation isolating the S10A2 sand by closing the sliding sleeve and opened the S10B sand.
